title: Rolson 58124 4 pc Contractor Holesaw Set
features: The hole saws are supplied complete with arbor and pilot drill
Cuts a perfect circular hole in wood of varying thickness
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring them innovative products, all at the possible margins and this year is no different. To date, they have over 250 exciting and innovative products to whet their appetite, together with a host of new in store packaging and point of sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to their existing lines. They bring product combinations that bring originality. Rolson 58124 4 pc Contractor Holesaw Set 4 pc Contractor Hole Saw Set Manufactured from hardened steel, the hole saws are supplied complete with arbor and pilot drill. 6 mm shank fits most electric drills. Cuts a circular hole in wood of varying thickness.
